column1: Hey Ryan, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
What up Spiffy, March 14-19. Looking to go to Occidental Punta Cana for a 2 person room package if possible
Cool I got you! I'll actually be on that resort that week too
is it just one room we're lookin for?
Yes, one 2 bedroom room if that's possible. Also, I may have some other people on board to add to my group but different rooms.
which school are you from? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
I got a little mix of different schools, University of Rhode Island and UMass
okay word thats wassup. I went to Salve not too far from URI
both Umass and URI know how to party for sure lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, were you lookin to get things booked tomorrow?
I would have to make some calls to confirm the amount of people in the group. But we would like to book asap
Do you have an estimated price for a group of 10?
yea np. pricing is based on a per room / per person occupancy. I'll send it over so you can check it out
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Yeah no problem, do you need my email ?
yea whats the best email to send to?
just sent over some sample quotes lmk if you got it
Yes I got it thank you
Are those prices include a group discount?
yessir these are our group rates
Hey Spiffy, unfortunately with the flight prices and times it's just not gonna workout for our group. Thank you sm for giving us a quote and responding fast. Appreciate the help
Spiffy can I call you tomorrow
Yoo yea lmk what time works
yea I got you. Ill give you a call. will be from our main line an 888# just a heads up
Loved “yea I got you. Ill give you a call. will be from our main line an 888# just a heads up”
Does everyone in my room have to take the same flight ?
Actually never mind they don't have to right
Nah they dont, we treat each persons flight times separately to schedule pick ups
As of right now, it looks like there will be 5 people in my group. 5 people, 2 rooms 1 3 person room and 1 2 person room
My room (3 person room) plans on booking as early as tonight, is it okay if we all book at different times?
cool bro. yea we can get the 3 of you started tonight!
then we can add the others afterward
Cool, also a possible 6 more might join the group too. So a total of 11
yea no prob, just lmk when we're ready and I'll send the link over
Do you know if the 2 person rooms have 1 or 2 beds?
Typically 2 beds but, the resort holds discretion based on what they have available at time of your arrival
meaning, if there ever ends up being a chance they have no more two bed rooms avail at the time of check in, and they can only give a 1 bed room, they will
when it comes to 2 person reservations
again, this is rare but just letting you know about all of the potentials
Hey spiffy, can I get the link to book? My room of 3 is gonna book tonight
Yo! Yea I got you bro
just sent that over lmk if you need any help getting on. I can add the others on tomorrow after you get settled tonight
For my room, can we all pay separately? Or do we need to pay on one card?
Nevermind just read that part lol
What's good spiffy, can you check if we did the booking right? Just making sure we are good
yessir y'all good! just gotta add in your flights and your good to go
Perfect, I just put in my flights. I have a different flight home than my 2 other roommates, so will we be able to get 2 rides from the resort to the airport? Bc my flight is earlier than there's.
Yea everyone's arrival and departure times are treated individually
Awesome, there should be another 2 person room that signed up. Ben and Dylan, just want to make sure you see those too.
I dont actually. where'd they sign up?
They used the link I sent them. Maybe they didn't join my room or something? But they said they are all set and paid for

Hey Spiffy, my 2 friends said they got an email that they are forced to cancel their trip even tho they already booked and paid for a room. Let me know if you know anything about it and if they can get their room back. Thank you
Hey bro, yea the resort completely sold out yesterday evening so all recent bookings from last night were cancelled and refunded unfort
Damn fr? They booked before yesterday tho
Yea just looked, looks like all reservations from this weekend
Had a few groups in the same situation
Yeah I understand that. But is there anything you can do about it because they are in our group
Unfortunately with the resort sold out theres nothing we can do
If theres a different resort you'd all want to do together, we can look into that
Thank you for your help with booking you were so clutch
ofc no prob. I'll be out there when y'all get there too
Oh yeah that's right. That's fire, do we buy the party passes there or online?
I would grab them online idk what will be available in person or what the prices will be
Which ones were you lookin to do?
yea you can either add them yourself or I can add it for you
Def recommend doing Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and the booze cruise everyone does those
Okay is there a link for the options? I gotta see what my roommates want to do
Technically not a separate link nah. It's all within your accounts on the portal
Coco Bongo: $79 per person Imagine: $89 per person Maroca: $69 per person Booze Cruise: $75 per person
Comes wi th round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, open bar
Oh okay awesome, so we can buy each per night
yup yup. I can hook it up with a bundle deal if you wanna do multiple
Okay cool, we are definitely interested but will need a lil more time if that is chill. They these sell out?
yea np. you have up to 2 days before the trip
Spiffy what's going on, I got a question. I know the clubs are low key far from the resort, will there be transportation there and back?
yo! we have round trip coach bus transportation to the events. did you want to add the party pass to your acct?

Hey spiffy I know this is probably way out of your hands by now but is there anyway I can add a person to my 3 person room to make it 4? I know this is totally last minute just seeing if that was possible? Thank you
yo! I actually may be able to. I'll put the request in right now
Would they be ready to pay for their slot like as soon as its ready?
Awesome, thank you. She should be ready to pay for their slot asap yes
We are closing in on what party passes we want to buy, I will let you know that asap as well
Do you know what the price would be for the 4th roommate if the request goes through?
yea I'm actually not too sure
Okay, what link do I use to send to her
Nevermind I got it, thank you so much.
Yo I may be able to get Ben back in actually
I can reach out to both of them again and see if they are still down. I think they both canceled their flights and stuff so
Dylan said that he has your number and will text you about getting back in
Bet I just texted him back
Hey spiffy do you know what days each party pass is?
Like what days are each club
yo! yea I'll send you an email with it in a few
hey also btw we need that new spot filled and paid by 8pm today for processing! they haven't hopped in yet
Loved “yo! yea I'll send you an email with it in a few”
Perfect, she said she will be paid by tonight I'll keep reminder her
heres the off resort nightclub sched Monday March 16 - Booze Cruise (Day) / Pearl Beach Club (Night) Tuesday March 17 - Imagine Cave Wednesday March 18 - Coco Bongo
The last spot is filled, do you see it on your side?
Do you know how much a party package would be for all the nights?
morning yea just need Fiona and Erin to add their flight info. and here's party pass pricing Coco Bongo: $79 per person Imagine: $89 per person Maroca: $69 per person Booze Cruise: $79 per person
Okay awesome I'll let them know, so there isn't any package deal if we wanna buy all of them?
lmk if we wanna run it
Bet, I'll talk to the crew. We are definitely leaning towards coco bongo and the booze cruise
I will have a solid answer for you by tonight
bet. Imagine Cave is lit too
Okay bet, do you think we can schedule a call for later today? Just wanna sort out the last details of the trip.
I have 4 other boys who are down to do the party pass, do you think they can buy one through spring break u even if they didn't go through it?
yea Im out here now running the program but can set some time aside to chat quick. im avail now actually if you are
and yea we can hook them up with the party pass too. what resort are they staying at? also they wouldnt get the bundle deal you have unfort
I'm in class till 4:45, anytime after that I'm available
My 4 boys are also staying at Occidental
Word Occidental Punta Cana? Or Caribe
okay bet I can hook them up for sure just lmk. we'll wanna do it today tho. I'll make them a reservation with the party pass only
Yeah definitely will be ready to set up tonight. When would you be free to call?
My room is gonna do the passes for coco bongo and bookie cruise, do you think you can put that on my rooms accounts? I don't want to mess it up or anything
yo! Im around for a call if you wanna hop on
and yea I can add that in for your room
sup Ryan, just a heads up need Fiona and Erin to take care of their party pass tab by this evening
yooo safe travels today! see y'all when you get here
Yooo spiffy! We just landed, see you soon
What's up spiffy, do you know what event is tomorrow for the party pass?
Tomorrow is Pearl beach club at night gonna be super dope
Head to the lobby to the blue hospitality desk
Loved “Head to the lobby to the blue hospitality desk”

Got it, I had a question. We thought the booze cruise was tomorrow but we got a ticket for Wednesday. It's no big deal but do you think we can maybe change to tomorrow and not Wednesday? Again no big deal if not
yea so tomorrow and wednesday are the two booze cruise dates. if they gave you wednesday then that means tomorrow is officially full
Yeah that's what we assumed. Sounds good
